retrieved_result: What is self insured car insurance? 1 Answer0votes Every state requires motorists to carry some form of financial responsibility. Most people automatically translate that require into a requirement to have auto insurance, but most states also allow you to self-insure your vehicle. This is more common with businesses than individuals,
